## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **OS**: Windows Server 20__ / Windows 10 / Windows 11
- **FreeNameConvention version**: v3.x.x
- **Installation method**: Installer / From source

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, attach screenshots or paste the violation log (CSV export).

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
